name: Vresia the Wendigo all-mother
description:
WENDIGUSSY FOR THE WIN!!! GRRAAAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH!

I AM THE KING OF UNCONVENTIONALLY HOT BITCHES. YOU BREATHE MY AIR!

YOU LIVE BECAUSE I PERMITTED IT!

In all honesty, I love my followers and hope y'all a wonderful day! I love my y'alland my brothers and sisters here. Cheers to my 70th bot!
